title: Operate a forklift in a specific work area
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate a forklift in a specific work area demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Identify specific features of work area that need to be taken into account when moving load
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify specific features of work area that need to be taken into account when moving load?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify specific features of work area that need to be taken into account when moving load.

pcs.text: Identify workplace, industry and regulatory requirements for operating a forklift in the specific work area

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace, industry and regulatory requirements for operating a forklift in the specific work area.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards that exist in the work area, and manage the associated risks posed when moving load, including using personal protective equipment.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the hygiene and sanitation requirements for load to be moved, relevant to work area and type of load.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify manufacturer’s specifications for driving the forklift.
